name: Malted Coconut Marble Cake/1953 Winner
recipeInstructions:
A senior winner in the 1953 Pillsbury bakeoff.
Cream sugar and shortening until fluffy. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together. Beat eggs very well then add milk and vanilla and mix well. Beat egg mixture into sugar mixture alternately with flour mixture. Place two cups of the batter in a separate bowl. Add 1/2 cup chocolate malted milk powder. Blend well. Spoon yellow and malted batters alternately into a greased, floured 10-inch tube pan on bottom only. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes or until done. Frost then place under broiler for 2-5 minutes until delicately browned.
Broiled Coconut Frosting: Combine 1/4 cup melted butter or margarine, 1/2 cup firmly packed brown sugar, 1 cup chopped coconut, and 1/4 cup cream; mix well.
